name: Daily Roaming
description: Use your NZ plan's data, minutes and texts overseas for a flat daily fee. You're only charged on the days you use it.

name: Travel Pack 5GB
description: 5GB of data plus 120 minutes and 200 texts to use across 60+ destinations. Valid for 30 days.

name: Travel Pack 10GB
description: 10GB of data plus endless minutes and texts across 60+ destinations. Valid for 30 days.

name: Visitor eSIM 8GB
description: A prepaid eSIM for visitors to New Zealand. Scan a QR code and you're connected — no physical SIM required.

name: Data Top-up 5GB
description: Add 5GB to your current cycle. Handy when you're close to your allowance.

name: Endless Data Day Pass
description: Unlimited data for 24 hours. Great for a big download day or a move-in weekend.

name: Spotify Premium
description: Ad-free music included with your plan. Manage it from My Spark anytime.

name: Neon Streaming
description: Movies and box sets on demand, billed to your Spark account.
